description_long: This object is a flintlock pistol, featuring a curved wooden grip with ornate brass detailing at the butt. The barrel is long and cylindrical, made of brass or a similar metal, and is affixed to the wooden stock with metal fittings. The lock mechanism is exposed, showing a hammer and frizzen typical of flintlock firearms. The trigger guard is also metallic, curving elegantly beneath the grip. The overall design is reminiscent of 18th-century pistols, with a blend of wood and metal materials and decorative flourishes. The finish is mostly matte with some polished metallic highlights, giving it an antique appearance.
description: An antique flintlock pistol with a curved wooden grip, brass barrel, and exposed firing mechanism. The design features ornate metalwork and a classic historical style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the brass barrel, wooden grip, and detailed lock mechanism.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the rounded end of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lock mechanism and the smooth curvature of the wooden grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel.
